title: zziplib security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[0.13.78-2]
- Fix directory traversal in unzip binary
- Disable the CVE tests during the check phase - the reproducers for these are downloaded from the github
- Resolves: RHEL-105822
full_text:
[0.13.78-2]
- Fix directory traversal in unzip binary
- Disable the CVE tests during the check phase - the reproducers for these are downloaded from the github
- Resolves: RHEL-105822

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-20478-0.html
